title: ilex asperula var. asperula
intro: Ilex asperula var. asperula, also known as the small-leaved holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ilex asperula var. asperula include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
